brand.title: Brand
brand.description: ALWAYS pass @variables.brand ('Kwitko Coffee' or 'Bean & Brew') so the lookup is scoped to the current store.

productNamesCsv.title: Product Names CSV
productNamesCsv.description: EXACT product name(s), copied verbatim from the catalog or from a list you just showed, comma-separated. For 'the first one', use the exact name of that first item.
